why: Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound minecraft:select_known_packs must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and official body generated by the oracle answer. This is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence for one official empty known-pack list fixture only, not registry hydration, known-pack negotiation completion, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
what: The Rust oracle test configuration_select_known_packs_clientbound_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Clientbound, packet id 14, official body bytes) because v26_1_2.rs does not map Configuration clientbound packet id 0x0e.

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: ClientboundSelectKnownPacks(List<KnownPack>), ClientboundSelectKnownPacks.STREAM_CODEC, ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND.codec().encode/decode(ClientboundSelectKnownPacks), ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), and ClientboundSelectKnownPacks.knownPacks().
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Configuration clientbound select_known_packs dispatch.
Current Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound mapping contains cookie_request id 0x00 through update_tags id 0x0d, but not select_known_packs id 0x0e.

observed_failure: bad packet id 0xe in Clientbound Configuration; Stevenarella panicked while dispatching official Configuration clientbound select_known_packs packet id 14
